UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES FACTS TO SUPPORT ALL ELEMENTS OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION (EXCEPT 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION), INCLUDING INTENT, DAMAGES, OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT AND DUTY UNDER BIAKANJA FACTORS. DEMURRER TO THE SECOND "SIXTH" CAUSE OF ACTION FOR LOSS OF CREDIT EXPECTANCY IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO SUBSTANTIVE OPPOSITION. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED AGAIN (SEE CGC-13-529095 6/14/13 MINUTE ORDER) TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6C. NON-COMPLIANCE CAUSES UNNECESSARY CONFUSION AND DELAY. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ike M. Kaludi, Jr., Attorney at Law, (510-559-0320), specially appearing for Dean C. Lamb, Plaintiff opposing party.
No appearance by Defendant and moving party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts to support all elements of each cause of action (except 7th causes of action), including intent, damages, outrageous conduct and duty under Biakanja factors. Demurrer to the second "sixth" cause of action for Loss of Credit Expectancy is sustained without leave to amend. No substantive opposition. Defendant's counsel is ordered again (See CGC-13-529095 6/14/13 minute order) to comply with SFLR 2.6C. Non-compliance causes unnecessary confusion and delay. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
